item.title: neurotoxins
item.description: source: https://www.reddit.com/r/science/comments/1ki656o/people_living_within_a_mile_of_a_golf_course_had/https://www.reddit.com/r/science/comments/1ki656o/people_living_within_a_mile_of_a_golf_course_had/ https://www.psychiatrist.com/news/golf-course-living-linked-to-higher-parkinsons-risk/ There are much safer options for golf courses to use, it should be law they must adhere to organic farm standards. Stuff like soap, vitamin d, and small amounts of copper are not the same as these industrial agricultural pesticides: https://www.agdaily.com/technology/the-list-of-pesticides-approved-for-organic-production/ And for that matter, these pesticides should be banned in agriculture too. Organic farming is superior to industrial agriculture, and can feed everybody just fine: https://www.wsj.com/articles/SB10001424127887323374504578217601897610528. For anyone interested, GMO’s and Science: Scientists are reporting suppression of scientific data and are calling for a law mandating transparency of study results: https://imgur.com/a/yeb2l4f
item.dc:creator: theshopliftingseagull

item.dc:creator: ProppaGanda

item.title: Memes and stuff: drowsy edition
item.description:
Would guillotine factories show how much wealth is redistributed?
My partner and his brothers….
Calling them bronouns might actually convince some people to take them seriously, maybe.
I’m not a puppy girl, but I know a few.
The tie ins I’ve been hearing about from magic have been insane.
My partner sent this to me. I can’t control what happens when I’m asleep.
I wonder what spice palette would work best with such rich meat.
Surprise selfie camera is always traumatic.
Some of these I save because they’re absurd.
It’s been over 20 years since I’ve had a Spanish class, even I know that it actually says “good girl”. Lmao
I finally got to peg my partner a couple of weeks ago, it’s actually really fun. My partner told me that my autistic rocking was useful for once!
In high school I worked at a mom and pop movie rental place, we had a porn room. I avoided looking at the floor in there….
Kimchi is my shadow, her constant yelling annoys my partner, but I love it.
Somehow, they made twilight worse.
Trans rights are human rights, we should all have autonomy over our body. They won’t stop at trans people, they will come for us all.
Me at 15 saying that I’m not ok.
I don’t drink energy drinks, so a nice tea would be lovely.
Bumped my therapy back to once a month. I have the techniques, and being aided by meds, I’ll get it together eventually.
What about heresy bear? (Does that joke work? Idk)
I’m more into music to vibe to now. I might risk it for something silly fun like electric callboy tho. The metal I listen to now is mostly atmospheric or have a shoegaze influence anymore.
I usually play a warlock, pretty sure this would work.
“We asked a bunch of duuudes, and they said ‘Hell yeah’”.
Phrasing
Forklift memes, I don’t know why I love them.
These are probably all out of order still.
Took me a second to get the joke, then my transmasc friend pointed it out.
She’s just like me.
Me realizing I’m in a straight passing relationship with another queer person. People need to know I’m bi, is my septum piercing not big enough?!?!? Lmao
I always get people asking me if I know some of my friends deadnames, I don’t. I don’t ever want to know. If I did know I eliminate it from my memory by getting super stoned.
Still not sure what I want to be.
I switched back to iPhone because my partner was able to get a deal where we could get 2 new phones and they’d pay us $17 a month. Getting used to the Apple ecosystem again.
item.dc:creator: wonkysaurusrex

item.title: Progress - normal BMI!
item.description: I’m the poster child of why BMI is a wonky measurement. I’m now theoretically at a normal BMI but I still wear a size XL/16/46 and I still have significant abdominal obesity. But I won’t lie, it feels good to have passed that first huge barrier and technically not being obese or overweight anymore. Reality is different and ”normal weight” definitely (unfortunately ?) isn’t the same as skinny. I wish! I’ll take my wins where I can get them though! This is still a significant milestone.
item.dc:creator: ssmc

item.title: Classic meme dump
item.description: If you enjoyed this please consider helping my dad be able to stay in his home. Anything helps. https://www.gofundme.com/f/steves-back-injury-recovery-fund?attribution_id=sl:6c5bcbda-f378-40fb-90dc-3d9e94215b4b&lang=en_US&ts=1746742981&utm_campaign=fp_sharesheet&utm_content=amp13_c-amp14_t1-amp15_t1&utm_medium=customer&utm_source=facebook&v=amp14_t1
item.dc:creator: zoomzoom1618

item.title: Suffering and horror every day
item.description: Dr. Mohammed Mustafa, an Australian doctor who volunteered at al-Ahli Arab Hospital in Gaza, talks about his experiences in Gaza and the horrific things he saw in this short segment of a podcast. Innocent people are dying and the world (we) are just watching. Those who remain silent contribute to the suffering.
item.dc:creator: IslamExplained

item.title: What Happened Today #98
item.description: When Supreme Court justices break their typical silence to defend democracy, we're beyond normal politics. It's happened four times in the past three months, a shocking public display for the usually taciturn jurists. Trump's systematic purging of officials who won't bend to his will reveals an administration that demands absolute loyalty over competence or truth. Today he fired the Librarian of Congress and the acting FEMA director. He also attacked the Fed Chair again, calling him "a fool" for not reducing interest rates. Don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email on the homepage of https://www.govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/vance-india-pakistan 2. https://go.govbrief.today/us-uk-trade-deal 3. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-powell-fool+ 4. https://go.govbrief.today/vance-powell-wrong 5. https://go.govbrief.today/noaa-database-archived 6. https://go.govbrief.today/admin-upenn-donations 7. https://go.govbrief.today/defense-moves-transgender 8. https://go.govbrief.today/russia-wants-territory 9. https://go.govbrief.today/martin-nomination-pulled 10. https://go.govbrief.today/pirro-us-attorney 11. https://go.govbrief.today/patel-fbi-budget 12. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-fire-fema-head 13. https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-humanitarian-deport 14. https://go.govbrief.today/cbp-pregnancy-infants 15. https://go.govbrief.today/south-african-arrival 16. https://go.govbrief.today/doroudi-leaving-us 17. https://go.govbrief.today/dems-block-crypto-bill 18. https://go.govbrief.today/roberts-fight-excesses 19. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-fires-librarian-congress 20. https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-probe-james 21. https://go.govbrief.today/leo-critical-vance 22. https://go.govbrief.today/cadwalader-losting-lawyers 23. https://go.govbrief.today/mauritshuis-museum-reevaluating 24. https://go.govbrief.today/sotomayor-stand-up

item.description: Since my usual memes age on my phone for a month or two before I post them, I thought I'd just post all my favorite memes and screenshots about the new pope now.

item.title: Stop being cute!
item.description: My car is still in the shop so I ordered Uber Eats for dinner and I need to go downstairs and get it. I don’t usually order food to go but I was craving Thai Chicken Wings and I splurged a little bit. But Number One Meadow is being TOO CUTE. This is not fair!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays
